description: A young female adventurer at the very start of her journey, before she has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how she looks before any equipment is picked up, stripped down to only the base layer worn beneath armor. Extremely tough, self-assured and powerfully confident, with a fierce, determined expression and a commanding, unshakable posture. Sharp intense eyes, dark brown hair, and a lean, athletic, toned build that shows real strength and agility. Her stance is grounded, strong and self-assured — shoulders back, chin level, radiating quiet badass energy. She wears ONLY the plain, simple base-layer underclothes worn beneath armor — a modest basic cloth undershirt or chest wrap and simple linen undershorts — muted and understated, strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful; not casual modern clothes, not jeans, not a t-shirt. Modest and practical, not sexualized, not cute, not a princess, not a dress. She has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. She still looks cool, memorable, capable and genuinely badass through her fierce determined face, dark brown hair and commanding posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
